name: Talking Head Rant
description: Single-character monolog 15-22s — a relatable archetype talks straight to camera with a deadpan ranting tone. Optional hook screenshot overlay (Reddit post / news headline / chat message / tweet) holds the first 3-4s, then fades out and the character carries the rest. Default video model: veo-3.1 for premium lip-sync ($7.65/clip); kling-v3.0-pro is the cheap fallback (~$2.25/clip) when bulk batching. One of the most reliable retention formats on TikTok / Reels.

stackSummary.characterImage: google/gemini-3-pro-image-preview via OpenRouter (single character + setting, photorealistic)
stackSummary.talkingHead: google/veo-3.1 via OpenRouter (i2v, 10-15s, lip-sync via prompt + audio reference). Audio off, VO is added separately.
stackSummary.voiceover: ElevenLabs eleven_multilingual_v2 — long monologue, broken into beats. Language follows the user's brief.
stackSummary.captions: OpenRouter whisper-1, Caption[] format consumed by HormoziCaptions or KaraokeCaptions
stackSummary.music: ElevenLabs Music — minimal background bed (low energy), force_instrumental: true, volume 0.10
stackSummary.hookOverlay: src/lib/components/overlays/HookScreenshot.tsx (TODO component) or an inline with manual fade — see composition.md

constants.characterArchetype: one of 8 universal archetypes (remote IT worker, courier/driver, student, stay-at-home creator, office worker, Gen-Z urban, startup founder, performance marketer)
constants.hookWindow: first 3-4s — hook screenshot overlay fade-out at frame 90-120

variationAxes: character archetype (8 universal options — see fragments.md)
rant subject (work, dating, prices, IT life, transport, food, parenting, the news)
hook screenshot type (Reddit post / news headline / chat / tweet / TikTok comment)
VO language (any — English, Russian, Spanish; the format is character-driven, not language-specific)
doNotCopyLiterally: Monologue text, character name, exact prompts, hook screenshot text. Vibe reference only.
referenceNotes: No reference required by default — the character is generated. If the user wants a specific real person to appear, escalate to the reference-required gate (AGENTS.md hard rule #3) and require an uploaded photo.
